verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 belongs to the IZUMO family, whose founding member IZUMO1 is a canonical sperm-surface protein essential for sperm-egg fusion. Other IZUMO family members (IZUMO2, IZUMO3) are documented on sperm surfaces. IZUMO4 has a predicted single-pass TM domain and shares the IZUMO fold; despite the NCBI summary placing it in the nucleus (a terse, possibly non-sperm-context call), tissue-restricted surface display on sperm or gametes is plausible given family biology. This maps to contextual / tissue_restricted_surface pending definitive sperm-surface proteomics evidence.
